channel.title: Kata on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kata on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Virtualization Systems — Kata Containers
item.description: The container-VM hybrid: an OCI runtime placing each container or Kubernetes pod inside a microVM (QEMU / Firecracker / cloud-hypervisor / Dragonball) running a real Linux kernel. Hardware-grade isolation with container UX; substrate for Confidential Containers.
